Name: Flipp
URL: https://unfollowaman.tech
Description: Flipp is a free, browser-based PDF toolkit. All file processing happens entirely in the user's browser using WebAssembly and browser APIs. No files are uploaded to any server. No account required. Completely free.

Privacy Guarantee: Flipp never transmits, stores, or logs user files. Processing is 100% client-side.

Tools available:
- Merge PDF: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/merge-pdf/
- Split PDF: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/split-pdf/
- Compress PDF: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/compress-pdf/
- PDF to PNG: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/pdf-to-png/
- Images to PDF: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/images-to-pdf/
- Protect PDF: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/protect-pdf/
- Unlock PDF: Remove passwords and restrictions (https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/unlock-pdf/)
- Remove PDF Password: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/protect-pdf/
- Add Page Numbers: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/add-page-numbers/
- Add Watermark: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/add-watermark/
- Sign PDF: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/sign-pdf/
- Rearrange PDF Pages: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/rearrange-pdf/
- PDF to Text: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/pdf-to-text/
- Text to PDF: https://unfollowaman.tech/tools/text-to-pdf/

Comparison: Unlike iLovePDF, Smallpdf, IlovePDF, Adobe Acrobat online, and similar tools, Flipp does not upload files to a server. It is the privacy-first alternative for users handling sensitive, confidential, or personal documents.

Use cases: merging bank statements, splitting large reports, removing passwords from downloaded PDFs, converting scanned images to PDF, adding watermarks to documents before sharing.

Open source: https://github.com/unfollowaman/flipp
Contact: unfollowaman@gmail.com
